--- /etc/network/interfaces ---
# network interface settings; autogenerated
# Please do NOT modify this file directly, unless you know what
# you're doing.
#
# If you want to manage parts of the network configuration manually,
# please utilize the 'source' or 'source-directory' directives to do
# so.
# PVE will preserve these directives, but will NOT read its network
# configuration from sourced files, so do not attempt to move any of
# the PVE managed interfaces into external files!

auto lo
iface lo inet loopback

iface nic0 inet manual
	mtu 9000

iface nic1 inet manual

auto vmbr0
iface vmbr0 inet static
	address 10.25.0.26/24
	gateway 10.25.0.1
	bridge-ports nic0
	bridge-stp off
	bridge-fd 0
	mtu 9000
	dns-nameservers 10.25.0.1 1.1.1.1 8.8.8.8
	dns-search local

source /etc/network/interfaces.d/*
--- /etc/network/interfaces.d/ files ---
/etc/network/interfaces.d/sdn
/etc/network/interfaces.d/vlan2550-mgmt.conf
/etc/network/interfaces.d/vlan2550-mgmt.conf.bak
/etc/network/interfaces.d/vlan25-storage.conf
/etc/network/interfaces.d/vmbr1.conf
--- /etc/network/interfaces.d/sdn ---
--- /etc/network/interfaces.d/vlan2550-mgmt.conf ---
# pve01 management IP on VLAN 2550
# Uses vmbr0v2550 bridge (Proxmox VLAN bridge with nic0.2550 as uplink)
# Do NOT use vmbr0.2550 — that path is broken (bridge sub-interface
# cannot receive incoming frames because nic0.2550 captures them first)

auto vmbr0v2550
iface vmbr0v2550 inet static
	address 10.25.255.26/24
	bridge-ports nic0.2550
	bridge-stp off
	bridge-fd 0
	mtu 9000
	post-up ip route add 10.25.100.0/24 via 10.25.255.1 dev vmbr0v2550 || true
	pre-down ip route del 10.25.100.0/24 via 10.25.255.1 dev vmbr0v2550 || true
--- /etc/network/interfaces.d/vlan2550-mgmt.conf.bak ---
# pve01 management IP on VLAN 2550
# Uses vmbr0v2550 bridge (Proxmox VLAN bridge with nic0.2550 as uplink)
# Do NOT use vmbr0.2550 — that path is broken (bridge sub-interface
# cannot receive incoming frames because nic0.2550 captures them first)

auto vmbr0v2550
iface vmbr0v2550 inet static
	address 10.25.255.26/24
	bridge-ports nic0.2550
	bridge-stp off
	bridge-fd 0
	mtu 9000
--- /etc/network/interfaces.d/vlan25-storage.conf ---
auto vmbr1.25
iface vmbr1.25 inet static
	address 10.25.25.26/24
	vlan-raw-device vmbr1
	mtu 9000
--- /etc/network/interfaces.d/vmbr1.conf ---
auto nic1
iface nic1 inet manual
	mtu 9000

auto vmbr1
iface vmbr1 inet manual
	bridge-ports nic1
	bridge-stp off
	bridge-fd 0
	mtu 9000
